title: Software Engineer
duties: Designs, develops, modifies, documents, tests, implements and supports software applications and systems.
Analyses user needs and software requirements to determine feasibility and system design.
Writes and maintains program code that meets system requirements and technical specifications.
Tests, debugs, diagnoses and corrects errors in software applications.

title: Developer Programmer
duties: Interprets specifications and technical designs for software development tasks.
Builds, tests and maintains application code using programming languages and frameworks.
Prepares technical documentation for program logic, data flows and user requirements.
Identifies and resolves defects in software modules and integrated systems.

title: Analyst Programmer
duties: Analyses business requirements and translates them into software system specifications.
Designs, develops and maintains software applications and database-driven systems.
Tests program functionality and investigates production issues or defects.
Works with stakeholders to refine system workflows, reports and integration points.

title: ICT Business Analyst
duties: Identifies and evaluates business processes, procedures and work practices.
Gathers and documents business requirements for ICT system changes.
Models data, workflows and functional specifications for solution design.
Supports testing, implementation and change management for ICT projects.

title: Systems Analyst
duties: Evaluates existing ICT systems and recommends improvements to meet business needs.
Prepares system specifications, data models and process diagrams.
Coordinates system design, testing and implementation activities.
Analyses system performance and supports issue resolution across applications.

title: Database Administrator
duties: Administers database management systems, access controls and backup procedures.
Monitors database performance, capacity and availability.
Develops database structures, queries and maintenance processes.
Troubleshoots database errors and supports data security requirements.

title: ICT Security Specialist
duties: Assesses ICT security risks, vulnerabilities and control requirements.
Implements security policies, monitoring tools and incident response procedures.
Investigates security events and recommends remediation actions.
Maintains documentation for access controls, compliance and security architecture.

title: Computer Network and Systems Engineer
duties: Designs, configures and maintains computer networks and communication systems.
Monitors network performance, reliability and security controls.
Troubleshoots hardware, software and connectivity issues across infrastructure.
Prepares technical documentation for network architecture and operational procedures.

title: Network Administrator
duties: Installs, configures and maintains network hardware, software and user access.
Monitors system performance, backups and network availability.
Diagnoses connectivity faults and coordinates repairs or upgrades.
Maintains operational records, security settings and support documentation.

title: Network Analyst
duties: Analyses network traffic, capacity and performance requirements.
Recommends improvements to network configuration, resilience and security.
Tests network changes and documents technical findings.
Supports implementation of communications systems and monitoring processes.

title: ICT Quality Assurance Engineer
duties: Develops test strategies, plans and cases for ICT systems and software releases.
Executes functional, regression and integration testing activities.
Records defects, analyses quality trends and reports release readiness.
Improves quality processes, automation coverage and testing documentation.

title: ICT Support Engineer
duties: Provides technical support for ICT systems, infrastructure and applications.
Investigates incidents, service requests and recurring operational issues.
Configures hardware, software and user access according to support procedures.
Maintains knowledge base articles, support records and escalation notes.

title: Information and Organisation Professionals nec
duties: Analyses organisational information, systems, records or knowledge processes.
Develops reports, procedures and recommendations to improve business operations.
Coordinates information management, data quality or organisational improvement activities.
Supports stakeholders with research, documentation and process implementation.

title: Civil Engineer
duties: Plans, designs and supervises construction of civil engineering projects.
Prepares specifications, drawings, cost estimates and project schedules.
Analyses soil, materials, drainage and structural requirements.
Inspects works to ensure compliance with design, safety and regulatory standards.

title: Geotechnical Engineer
duties: Investigates soil, rock and groundwater conditions for engineering projects.
Analyses geotechnical risks affecting foundations, slopes and earthworks.
Prepares technical reports, designs and recommendations for construction teams.
Monitors site conditions and advises on ground improvement or remediation measures.

title: Structural Engineer
duties: Designs structural systems for buildings, bridges and other infrastructure.
Calculates loads, stresses and material performance requirements.
Reviews drawings, specifications and construction methods for structural integrity.
Inspects structural works and advises on defects, repairs or modifications.

title: Electrical Engineer
duties: Designs electrical systems, equipment, circuits and power distribution networks.
Prepares specifications, drawings, calculations and technical reports.
Tests electrical installations and investigates performance or safety issues.
Oversees installation, maintenance and commissioning of electrical equipment.

title: Electronics Engineer
duties: Designs electronic circuits, devices, control systems and communications equipment.
Develops prototypes, technical specifications and test procedures.
Investigates faults and recommends improvements to electronic systems.
Supervises installation, operation and maintenance of electronic equipment.

title: Mechanical Engineer
duties: Plans and designs mechanical equipment, machines, components and systems.
Develops specifications for manufacture, installation, operation and maintenance.
Investigates failures and recommends modifications to improve performance.
Oversees installation, testing, inspection and maintenance of mechanical plant.

title: Production or Plant Engineer
duties: Plans and manages manufacturing processes, plant layout and production methods.
Analyses plant performance, efficiency, safety and quality outcomes.
Develops specifications for equipment, workflow and process improvements.
Coordinates maintenance, commissioning and continuous improvement activities.

title: Engineering Technologist
duties: Applies engineering technologies to design, testing and operational problems.
Prepares technical reports, models, specifications and implementation plans.
Evaluates equipment, processes and systems for performance improvements.
Supports engineers with research, product development and project delivery.

title: Environmental Engineer
duties: Assesses environmental impacts of engineering projects and industrial activities.
Designs systems for pollution control, waste treatment and resource management.
Prepares environmental reports, monitoring plans and compliance documentation.
Advises on sustainability, remediation and regulatory requirements.

title: Civil Engineering Draftsperson
duties: Prepares detailed drawings and plans for civil engineering works.
Interprets survey data, specifications and engineering instructions.
Uses CAD software to produce construction documentation and design revisions.
Assists engineers with quantities, records and technical project information.

title: Civil Engineering Technician
duties: Conducts tests and collects data for civil engineering projects.
Assists with site inspections, measurements and quality control activities.
Prepares technical records, calculations and reports for engineers.
Supports construction supervision and project administration tasks.

title: Registered Nurse
duties: Assesses, plans, implements and evaluates nursing care for patients.
Administers medication and treatments while monitoring patient responses.
Coordinates care with doctors, allied health professionals and support networks.
Provides health education and supports patient safety and recovery planning.

title: Registered Nurse (Critical Care and Emergency)
duties: Provides specialised nursing care for critically ill or emergency patients.
Monitors vital signs, life support systems and acute clinical changes.
Administers urgent treatments and supports emergency response procedures.
Documents care plans and coordinates with medical teams in high-pressure settings.

title: Registered Nurse (Medical)
duties: Provides nursing care for patients with medical conditions and ongoing health needs.
Monitors symptoms, medications, test results and patient progress.
Supports treatment plans, discharge planning and patient education.
Maintains clinical records and coordinates care with multidisciplinary teams.

title: Registered Nurse (Mental Health)
duties: Provides nursing care for people experiencing mental health conditions.
Assesses mental state, risk factors, medication responses and support needs.
Implements therapeutic interventions and recovery-oriented care plans.
Coordinates with psychiatrists, families and community support services.

title: Registered Nurse (Perioperative)
duties: Provides nursing care before, during and after surgical procedures.
Prepares operating rooms, instruments and patient documentation.
Assists surgical teams while monitoring patient safety and sterile practice.
Supports post-operative recovery, pain management and clinical handover.

title: Occupational Therapist
duties: Assesses functional capacity, daily living skills and environmental barriers.
Develops therapy plans to improve independence, participation and safety.
Recommends adaptive equipment, home modifications and rehabilitation strategies.
Documents progress and coordinates care with families and healthcare teams.

title: Physiotherapist
duties: Assesses physical conditions affecting movement, pain and function.
Develops treatment programs using exercise, manual therapy and education.
Monitors rehabilitation progress and adjusts therapy plans.
Advises patients on injury prevention, mobility and ongoing self-management.

title: Speech Pathologist
duties: Assesses communication, swallowing, speech and language disorders.
Develops therapy plans and intervention strategies for clients.
Provides treatment, education and communication support to families or carers.
Maintains clinical records and collaborates with health and education professionals.

title: Medical Diagnostic Radiographer
duties: Operates imaging equipment to produce diagnostic radiographic images.
Positions patients and applies radiation safety procedures.
Reviews image quality and records clinical imaging information.
Works with radiologists and healthcare teams to support diagnosis.

title: Sonographer
duties: Performs ultrasound examinations using specialised imaging equipment.
Selects imaging techniques based on clinical referrals and patient needs.
Analyses image quality and documents sonographic findings for review.
Maintains patient safety, privacy and equipment quality procedures.

title: Optometrist
duties: Examines eyes to assess vision, eye health and visual disorders.
Prescribes corrective lenses, vision therapy or referrals for medical care.
Uses diagnostic equipment to detect eye disease or visual abnormalities.
Advises patients on eye health, lens use and preventive care.

title: Dentist
duties: Examines teeth, gums and oral tissues to diagnose dental conditions.
Provides preventive, restorative and surgical dental treatments.
Interprets diagnostic images and develops oral health treatment plans.
Educates patients on oral hygiene, prevention and ongoing dental care.

title: General Practitioner
duties: Diagnoses and treats acute and chronic medical conditions in primary care.
Orders investigations, prescribes treatments and manages referrals.
Provides preventive health advice, screening and continuity of care.
Maintains medical records and coordinates with specialists or allied health providers.

title: Medical Practitioners nec
duties: Diagnoses, treats and manages patient health conditions within a medical specialty.
Orders tests, interprets results and develops treatment plans.
Consults with healthcare teams and provides specialist medical advice.
Maintains clinical records and supports patient safety and continuity of care.

title: Social Worker
duties: Assesses client needs, risks, strengths and social support requirements.
Develops intervention plans and connects clients with services or resources.
Advocates for clients in health, welfare, housing or legal settings.
Maintains case notes and collaborates with multidisciplinary support teams.

title: Clinical Psychologist
duties: Assesses, diagnoses and treats mental health and behavioural conditions.
Provides psychological therapy using evidence-based intervention approaches.
Conducts psychometric assessments and prepares clinical reports.
Collaborates with medical, education and community support professionals.

title: Early Childhood (Pre-primary School) Teacher
duties: Plans and delivers learning programs for young children before primary school.
Observes children's development, behaviour and learning progress.
Creates safe, inclusive and stimulating learning environments.
Communicates with families and maintains education records.

title: Primary School Teacher
duties: Plans, prepares and delivers lessons across primary curriculum areas.
Assesses student learning and provides feedback on progress.
Manages classroom behaviour and supports student wellbeing.
Communicates with parents, carers and school staff about student needs.

title: Secondary School Teacher
duties: Plans and teaches subject-specific lessons for secondary students.
Assesses assignments, examinations and classroom performance.
Supports student learning, behaviour management and pastoral care.
Prepares teaching materials and participates in school reporting processes.

title: Special Needs Teacher
duties: Plans and delivers learning programs for students with additional needs.
Adapts curriculum, teaching methods and assessment strategies.
Works with families, therapists and support staff to implement learning plans.
Monitors student progress and maintains individual education documentation.

title: Accountant (General)
duties: Prepares financial statements, budgets, tax returns and accounting reports.
Reviews income, expenditure, assets, liabilities and financial commitments.
Advises on accounting systems, tax obligations and financial controls.
Maintains records and supports compliance with reporting requirements.

title: Management Accountant
duties: Prepares management reports, budgets, forecasts and cost analyses.
Analyses business performance and financial trends for decision-making.
Develops internal controls, pricing models and financial planning processes.
Advises managers on profitability, efficiency and resource allocation.

title: Taxation Accountant
duties: Prepares tax returns, statements and compliance documentation.
Advises clients or organisations on tax obligations and planning issues.
Reviews financial records to identify taxable income, deductions and liabilities.
Liaises with tax authorities and supports audits or dispute processes.

title: External Auditor
duties: Examines financial records, controls and reporting processes.
Plans audit procedures and tests transactions for accuracy and compliance.
Identifies audit findings, risks and control weaknesses.
Prepares audit reports and communicates recommendations to stakeholders.

title: Corporate Services Manager
duties: Plans and directs administrative, corporate support and shared service functions.
Develops policies, budgets and operational procedures for business services.
Coordinates resources, reporting and compliance across organisational units.
Advises senior management on service delivery and organisational efficiency.

title: Finance Manager
duties: Plans, organises and controls financial operations and reporting.
Develops budgets, forecasts, financial policies and risk controls.
Analyses financial performance and advises on business strategy.
Oversees accounting teams, audits, compliance and cash flow management.

title: Construction Project Manager
duties: Plans, directs and coordinates construction projects from initiation to completion.
Manages project budgets, schedules, contracts and site resources.
Coordinates contractors, consultants, approvals and safety requirements.
Monitors progress, quality and compliance with project specifications.

title: Engineering Manager
duties: Plans and directs engineering operations, projects and technical teams.
Develops engineering policies, budgets, schedules and quality systems.
Reviews designs, technical standards and project delivery risks.
Coordinates engineering resources and reports to senior management.

title: ICT Project Manager
duties: Plans, manages and delivers ICT projects within scope, time and budget.
Coordinates project teams, vendors, stakeholders and governance activities.
Tracks risks, issues, resources and implementation milestones.
Prepares project documentation, reports and change management plans.

title: Cafe or Restaurant Manager
duties: Plans and manages daily operations of cafes, restaurants or dining venues.
Coordinates staff rosters, service standards, suppliers and stock control.
Monitors budgets, sales, customer service and food safety requirements.
Handles customer feedback and ensures venue compliance with regulations.

title: Chef
duties: Plans menus, estimates food and labour costs and orders food supplies.
Prepares, seasons and cooks food according to recipes and quality standards.
Supervises kitchen staff and coordinates food preparation and service timing.
Monitors hygiene, storage, presentation and kitchen safety standards.

title: Cook
duties: Prepares and cooks meals, dishes and food items according to menus.
Checks food quality, presentation and portion standards.
Maintains kitchen cleanliness, food storage and hygiene procedures.
Assists with stock control, preparation schedules and kitchen workflow.

title: Motor Mechanic
duties: Detects and diagnoses mechanical and electrical faults in vehicles.
Dismantles, repairs and replaces engine, transmission and suspension components.
Uses diagnostic equipment, tools and test procedures to confirm faults.
Tests and adjusts repaired vehicles for performance and roadworthiness.

title: Metal Fabricator
duties: Marks out, cuts, shapes and joins metal sections and components.
Reads drawings, specifications and measurements for fabrication work.
Uses welding, forming and cutting equipment to assemble metal structures.
Inspects finished work for accuracy, strength and quality requirements.

title: Welder
duties: Joins metal parts using welding processes and equipment.
Reads drawings and prepares materials for welding tasks.
Selects welding methods, settings and consumables for job requirements.
Inspects welded joints and repairs defects to meet quality standards.

title: Bricklayer
duties: Lays bricks, blocks and stone to construct walls, foundations and structures.
Reads plans, sets out work areas and prepares mortar or materials.
Cuts and shapes masonry units to fit design requirements.
Checks levels, alignment and structural quality during construction.

title: Carpenter
duties: Constructs, installs and repairs structures and fixtures made of timber or similar materials.
Reads plans, measures materials and sets out building components.
Cuts, shapes and assembles framing, flooring, doors and fittings.
Checks workmanship for accuracy, safety and building code requirements.

title: Plumber
duties: Installs, repairs and maintains water, gas, drainage and sanitary systems.
Reads plans and determines layout of pipes, fixtures and fittings.
Tests plumbing systems for leaks, pressure and compliance.
Diagnoses faults and replaces or repairs defective plumbing components.

title: Electrician (General)
duties: Installs, tests, connects and maintains electrical wiring and equipment.
Reads electrical plans, diagrams and technical specifications.
Diagnoses faults and repairs electrical systems and components.
Ensures work complies with safety standards and electrical regulations.

title: Airconditioning and Refrigeration Mechanic
duties: Installs, maintains and repairs airconditioning and refrigeration systems.
Diagnoses electrical, mechanical and refrigerant faults.
Tests system performance, pressures, controls and safety devices.
Carries out servicing, component replacement and compliance documentation.

title: Cabinetmaker
duties: Fabricates, assembles and installs cabinets, furniture and fitted interiors.
Reads drawings and measures materials for cutting and assembly.
Uses woodworking machines, hand tools and finishing techniques.
Checks fit, finish and quality of completed cabinetry.

title: Camera Operator (Film, Television or Video)
duties: Operates cameras and related equipment for film, television or video production.
Frames shots, adjusts focus, exposure and movement according to production needs.
Works with directors and production teams to capture required visual material.
Maintains camera equipment and supports lighting or recording setup.

title: Enrolled Nurse
duties: Provides nursing care under the direction and supervision of registered nurses.
Monitors patient condition, records observations and reports changes.
Assists with medication, personal care and clinical procedures within scope.
Supports care planning, patient comfort and health education activities.

title: Community Worker
duties: Supports individuals and groups to access community services and resources.
Assesses client needs and assists with support plans or referrals.
Facilitates programs, advocacy and community development activities.
Maintains case notes and works with service providers or agencies.

title: Child Care Worker
duties: Provides care and supervision for children in education or care settings.
Supports children's routines, play, learning and social development.
Maintains safe, clean and inclusive environments for children.
Communicates with families and records observations or incidents.

title: Travel Consultant
duties: Advises clients on travel options, itineraries, fares and booking conditions.
Arranges transport, accommodation, tours, insurance and travel documentation.
Processes bookings, payments and itinerary changes.
Provides destination, visa and travel information to customers.

title: Program or Project Administrator
duties: Coordinates project documentation, schedules, budgets and reporting activities.
Supports project managers with procurement, records and stakeholder communication.
Tracks milestones, risks, actions and administrative requirements.
Maintains project files and assists with governance or compliance processes.

title: Clinical Coder
duties: Reviews clinical records and assigns standardised diagnosis and procedure codes.
Ensures coding accuracy according to classification standards and guidelines.
Queries clinicians to clarify documentation where required.
Supports health data reporting, audit and quality improvement activities.

title: Property Manager
duties: Manages rental properties, leases, inspections and tenant communication.
Coordinates maintenance, rent collection and property condition reporting.
Advises owners on tenancy obligations, market conditions and property performance.
Maintains records and supports compliance with tenancy legislation.

title: Quality Assurance Manager
duties: Plans and manages quality systems, audits and continuous improvement programs.
Develops standards, procedures and reporting frameworks for quality assurance.
Investigates non-conformance issues and coordinates corrective actions.
Advises management on compliance, certification and process performance.

title: Agricultural Consultant
duties: Advises on agricultural production, land use, crop, livestock and business practices.
Analyses farm operations, soil, water, climate and market factors.
Prepares reports and recommendations to improve productivity and sustainability.
Supports implementation of farm management and compliance strategies.

title: Agricultural Scientist
duties: Conducts research into crops, livestock, soil, pests and agricultural systems.
Collects and analyses scientific data to improve production or sustainability.
Develops trials, reports and technical recommendations.
Advises industry, government or producers on agricultural science findings.

title: Medical Laboratory Scientist
duties: Performs laboratory tests on biological specimens to support diagnosis and treatment.
Operates analytical equipment and validates test results.
Maintains quality control, safety and laboratory documentation procedures.
Communicates abnormal findings and supports clinical interpretation workflows.

title: Veterinarian
duties: Diagnoses, treats and prevents disease and injury in animals.
Performs examinations, surgery, vaccinations and diagnostic procedures.
Advises animal owners on health, nutrition, welfare and disease prevention.
Maintains clinical records and complies with animal health regulations.

title: Solicitor
duties: Provides legal advice, prepares documents and represents clients in legal matters.
Researches legislation, case law and legal precedents.
Drafts contracts, correspondence, pleadings and settlement documentation.
Negotiates with parties and supports dispute resolution or court processes.

title: Architect
duties: Designs buildings and spaces according to client, regulatory and site requirements.
Prepares drawings, specifications, models and design documentation.
Coordinates consultants, approvals and construction administration activities.
Advises on materials, sustainability, cost and design feasibility.

title: Landscape Architect
duties: Plans and designs outdoor spaces, landscapes and environmental settings.
Prepares concept designs, planting plans, specifications and documentation.
Assesses site conditions, ecology, drainage and user requirements.
Coordinates with clients, planners, engineers and construction teams.

title: Graphic Designer
duties: Creates visual concepts, layouts and designs for print, digital and brand materials.
Prepares artwork, typography, imagery and production-ready files.
Interprets briefs and develops design solutions for communication objectives.
Collaborates with clients, marketers and production suppliers.

title: Marketing Specialist
duties: Researches markets, customer behaviour, competitors and campaign performance.
Develops marketing strategies, content plans and promotional activities.
Coordinates campaigns across digital, print, events or partner channels.
Analyses results and recommends improvements to marketing effectiveness.

title: Management Consultant
duties: Analyses organisational problems, processes and management practices.
Develops recommendations to improve efficiency, performance or structure.
Prepares reports, business cases, implementation plans and stakeholder presentations.
Supports change management, process redesign and project delivery.

title: Financial Market Dealer
duties: Buys and sells financial products on behalf of clients or organisations.
Analyses market conditions, pricing, risk and investment opportunities.
Executes transactions according to trading strategies and compliance rules.
Maintains records and reports on portfolio or market performance.
